nasb.text: Moses said to the Lord, “The people cannot come up to Mount Sinai, for You warned us, saying, ‘Set bounds about the mountain and consecrate it.’ ”

esv.text: And Moses said to the Lord, “The people cannot come up to Mount Sinai, for you yourself warned us, saying, ‘Set limits around the mountain and consecrate it.’”

cnv.text: 摩西對耶和華說：“人民不能上西奈山，因為你曾經警告我們，說：‘要給山定界限，也要把山分別為聖。’”

ccb.text: 摩西对耶和华说：“百姓不能上西奈山，因为你已经吩咐我们要在山的四围划定界限，使这山成为圣山。”
